memobottle

NUTS ABOUT PISTACHIO
SHOP NOW

LIMITED-EDITION COLOURWAY

The Stainless Steel memobottle in Pistachio celebrates the beauty of contrasts, with its understated colour palette perfectly balancing its bold, modernist design.

DISCOVER PISTACHIO

INSIDE THE PALETTE
An earthy sage green gently softened by a hint of grey, Pistachio brings refined elegance to its confident, sculpted silhouette — creating a quietly luxurious bottle that matches your dynamic, multifaceted lifestyle.

MADE FOR YOU
Inspired by the calm, grounded beauty of nature, Pistachio is made for those who find beauty in every moment.

CARRY WATER DIFFERENTLY
A combination of form, function, and fashion, the memobottle's flat, paper-inspired shape is designed to fit seamlessly into handbags, backpacks, pockets, and more, making the most of the space you have.

SHOP NOW

BETTER PRODUCTS   Certified B Corporation   BIGGER PURPOSE

MULTI-AWARD WINNING DESIGN
2-YEAR MANUFACTURING WARRANTY
DESIGNED IN AUSTRALIA

memobottle

A NEW CHAPTER IN COLOUR HAS ARRIVED
EXPLORE THE COLLECTION

LIMITED-EDITION

The Stainless Steel memobottles you know and love are now in brand new, limited-edition colours.

Expanding beyond our classic black and white bestsellers for the very first time, Pink Salt and Pistachio are here, in all four memobottle sizes.

Inspired by Australia — our home of lush green landscapes and dazzling pink lakes — these new shades are soft, sophisticated, and unmistakably modern.

ORDER NOW BEFORE THEY'RE GONE

PINK SALT
[Product photo — A5 memobottle in Pink Salt]

PISTACHIO
[Product photo — A5 memobottle in Pistachio]

Once they're gone, they won't return. Don't miss your chance to snap up these exclusive colours.

ENTER NOW

YOU COULD BE BOARDING YOUR FLIGHT TO JAPAN SOON.

There's still time to enter for your chance to win an $8,000 AUD Japan escape for you and your best friend with memobottle x ARRIVAL.

Imagine drifting from Tokyo's vibrant streets to Kyoto's quiet shrines, with boutique stays, local flavours, and endless discovery along the way.

Entries close soon, so don't miss your moment.
